login.success: You have been successfully logged in.

logout.success: You have been successfully logged out.

register.success: Your account has been created successfully.

forgot_password.email_sent: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a reset link shortly.

reset_password.success: Your password has been reset successfully.
reset_password.failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

mail.subject: Reset your password
mail.intro: You are receiving this email because we received a password reset request for your account.
mail.outro: If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.
mail.expiry: This password reset link will expire in {hours} hour.
mail.footer: If you're having trouble clicking the button, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser:

social.linked: Your {provider} account has been linked successfully.
social.set_password_info: Please set a password for your account to enable password login.
social.password_defined: Your password has been set successfully.
social.already_linked: This {provider} account is already linked to another user.

verify_email.success: Your email has been verified successfully.
verify_email.email_sent: A new verification email has been sent to your address.
verify_email.send_failed: Failed to send verification email. Please try again later.
verify_email.required: Please verify your email address to access this feature.

mail.subject: Verify your email address
mail.intro: Thank you for registering! Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
mail.outro: If you did not create an account, no further action is required.
mail.expiry: This verification link will expire in {hours} hour.
mail.footer: If you're having trouble clicking the button, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser:
